title: PHI OS Career
englishInput: Since November 2025, after a financial planning competition, I started treating PHI OS as long-term work rather than scattered study. I now write, build the platform, and organize the books every week. Client income is still limited and I feel tension between family responsibility, professional identity, and the wish to build a durable career. I want evidence that the direction can become sustainable.
chineseInput: 自2025年11月参加理财规划比赛后，我开始把 PHI OS 当作长期事业，而不是零散学习。我现在每周写作、开发平台并整理书籍；客户收入仍然有限，我在家庭责任、专业身份与建立长期事业之间感到拉扯。我希望取得这个方向能够持续发展的证据。
revisedEnglishInput: Since November 2025, weekly writing, platform development, and book organization have become the observable core of my PHI OS career direction.
revisedChineseInput: 自2025年11月起，每周写作、平台开发与书籍整理，已经成为 PHI OS 事业方向最明确的可观察变化。
desiredDirection: Establish whether PHI OS can become a sustainable professional direction without abandoning family responsibilities.
desiredDirectionZh: 确认 PHI OS 能否在不放弃家庭责任的前提下，成为可持续的专业方向。
observedEvidence: A public platform has been deployed.
reportedExperience: The direction feels meaningful but financially uncertain.
unknownReality: The rate at which paying demand can develop remains unknown.
